zh.lifeSummary: 當Madoc Kynaston於1360年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾時，他的父親Jenkins Kynaston30歲，母親Angharad Ferch Of Llewelyn Ddu28歲。他於1378年與Isolda filia Comitis Northumbriae在英國英格蘭史洛普爾盧德洛福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1403年7月21日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾史福斯波利享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Madoc Kynaston于1360年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾时，他的父亲Jenkins Kynaston30岁，母亲Angharad Ferch Of Llewelyn Ddu28岁。他于1378年与Isolda filia Comitis Northumbriae在英国英格兰史洛普爾盧德洛福结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1403年7月21日在英国英格兰史洛普爾史福斯波利享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kynaston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Kynaston: in Kinnerley (Shropshire), in Hentland (Herefordshire), or in Much Marcle (Herefordshire).

nameMeanings.name: Madoc
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name, possibly having the sense ‘fortunate’ or alternatively from Celtic aodh ‘fire’.

variants.name: Madog
meanings: Traditional name, possibly having the sense ‘fortunate’ or alternatively from Celtic aodh ‘fire’.

en.lifeSummary: When Madoc Kynaston was born in 1360, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Jenkins Kynaston, was 30 and his mother, Angharad Ferch Of Llewelyn Ddu, was 28. He married Isolda filia Comitis Northumbriae in 1378, in Ludlow, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 21 July 1403, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Madoc Kynaston est né en 1360, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Jenkins Kynaston, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Angharad Ferch Of Llewelyn Ddu, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Isolda filia Comitis Northumbriae en 1378, à Ludlow, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 21 juillet 1403, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Madoc Kynaston 1360 in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jenkins Kynaston 30 und seine Mutter Angharad Ferch Of Llewelyn Ddu 28. Er hat 1378 in Ludlow, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Isolda filia Comitis Northumbriae geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 21. Juli 1403 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Madoc Kynaston è nato il nel 1360 nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Jenkins Kynaston, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Angharad Ferch Of Llewelyn Ddu, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Isolda filia Comitis Northumbriae nel 1378, nel Ludlow, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 21 luglio 1403, nel Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Madoc Kynastonが1360年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Jenkins Kynastonは30歳，母Angharad Ferch Of Llewelyn Dduは28歳であった。1378年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアルドロウでIsolda filia Comitis Northumbriaeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1403年7月21日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Madoc Kynaston(이)가 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jenkins Kynaston(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Angharad Ferch Of Llewelyn Ddu(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1378년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 루들로에서 Isolda filia Comitis Northumbriae(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1403년 7월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Madoc Kynaston nasceu em 1360, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Jenkins Kynaston, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Angharad Ferch Of Llewelyn Ddu, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Isolda filia Comitis Northumbriae em 1378, em Ludlow, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 21 de julho de 1403, em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Madoc Kynaston родился в 1360 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Jenkins Kynaston было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Angharad Ferch Of Llewelyn Ddu, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Isolda filia Comitis Northumbriae в 1378 г. в местности лудлоу, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 21 июля 1403 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Madoc Kynaston nació en 1360, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Jenkins Kynaston, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Angharad Ferch Of Llewelyn Ddu, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Isolda filia Comitis Northumbriae en 1378, en Ludlow, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 21 de julio de 1403, en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 43 años.
